title: Off to Ko Phyam for Christmas

content:
Well having landed back in Thailand I clear in, a proposed crew member malfunctions and I head to the peace of Krabi Boat Lagoon.  Here I plan my new year refit without having a plan as to who is going to help me do it.

In any event I am heading off to Ko Phyam on the border with Myanmar for Christmas. About 160 nautical miles with the probability of very little wind.   Been there before a couple of times.  A lovely island with no cars. So I will have to brush up on my motor cycling skills.  In the meantime here are some of the jobs to be tackled in the new year - a warning to all of you who are thinking of getting a wooden boat...
